title: Luffy Stands Up to the Bandits
description: On pages 34–37, this part follows the Romance Dawn flashback and focuses on how Luffy’s pirate dream is formed through Shanks, Higuma, and the straw hat promise.
scene: Luffy’s loyalty to Shanks pushes him into danger as the bandits turn their attention toward him.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: CAPTAIN SHANKS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: LIFFY! I thought your punch was as powerful as a pistol.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Not now, Cap'n!!

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: HMPH! You pirates are still here?

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: TAKING A BREAK FROM YOUR CLEANING DUTIES?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I don't know what you want, but you'd better back off before you get hurt.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: COME ANY CLOSER AND WE'LL HAVE TO KILL YOU... COWARDS.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: DIDN'T YOU HEAR HIM?! DON'T COME ANY CLOSER...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: ...OR I'LL BLOW YOUR HEAD OFF! HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh he

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: YOU'RE PUTTING YOUR LIFE ON THE LINE BY POINTING THAT AT ME.

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: Huh?! WHAT'RE YOU TALKING ABOUT?

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: I'm saying it's not safe to point guns.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WHATA--!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now you've gone and done it!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What've you done?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That wasn't fair!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Fair?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: STOP WHINING LAND- LUBBERS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're not dealing with saints here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And we don't play by the rules!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This was none of your business!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Listen up....

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU CAN POUR DRINKS ON ME, YOU CAN THROW FOOD AT ME...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: YOU CAN EVEN SPIT ON ME. I'LL JUST LAUGH THAT STuff OFF.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: BUT...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Good reason or not...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Nobody hurts a friend of mine!!!!!

summary: Luffy Stands Up to the Bandits is the main story beat of this section. The dialogue and reactions show how the chapter’s conflict develops, while the scene keeps the focus on the characters’ choices rather than technical OCR structure.
